rules_text: Broken rules: Connect Four is played on a 6x7 vertical grid. Two players take turns placing pieces in any position on the board. A player may place a piece even if there are empty spaces below it. The first player to connect five pieces in a row wins. If the board is full, the game continues until someone wins.
gold_errors: board size is incorrectly described as 6x7 instead of 7x6
players can place pieces in any position on the board
allows placing a piece above empty spaces
winning condition requires connecting five instead of four pieces
the game continues after the board is full instead of ending in a draw
